title: Alfons Zitterbacke
original_title: Alfons Zitterbacke: Das Chaos ist zurück
overview: Clumsy peculiar pupil Alfons Zitterbacke dreams of being an astronaut and wreaks havoc anywhere he goes but against all odds wants to proof everyone who is teasing him wrong especially his father who wants him to be more of a 'normal' kid.
